title: LET'S BUILD
SOMETHING.
hero.intro: We are selective about projects. If you have something that matters, let's talk.

sections.title: START WITH CONTEXT.
sections.body: Email signal@metafloor.in with the problem, constraints, what has already failed, and what outcome would make the project worth it.

sections.title: RESPONSE TIME VARIES.
sections.body: We are building, not sitting around waiting for leads. If the problem is serious and the scope is real, we will respond.

sections.title: WHAT TO SEND.
sections.body: Current stack, target users, deadline, budget range, data availability, deployment constraints, and any non-negotiable requirements.
